seoDescription: Download and print this medium soaring bald eagle in sky coloring sheet. Ideal for kids and teens with balanced outlines, natural textures, and a beautiful scenic background. Free printable PDF.
author: Antigravity Agent
funFacts: Bald Eagle in Skys are majestic birds of prey that possess large, hooked beaks and powerful talons capable of carrying heavy fish.
The nest of a bald Bald Eagle in Sky (called an eyrie) is the largest tree nest of any animal, growing up to 10 feet wide.
